nasb.text: After her he took Maacah the daughter of Absalom, and she bore him Abijah, Attai, Ziza and Shelomith.

esv.text: After her he took Maacah the daughter of Absalom, who bore him Abijah, Attai, Ziza, and Shelomith.

cnv.text: 後來，羅波安又娶了押沙龍的外孫女瑪迦；瑪迦給他生了亞比雅、亞太、細撒和示羅密。

ccb.text: 后来，他又娶了押沙龙的女儿玛迦，生了亚比雅、亚太、细撒、示罗密。
